=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/cryptoRandomUUID.ts(5,27): warning TS377078: This code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUID)
/.src/cryptoRandomUUID.ts(8,34): warning TS377078: This code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUID)
/.src/cryptoRandomUUID.ts(12,28): warning TS377078: This code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUID)
/.src/cryptoRandomUUID.ts(21,20): warning TS377078: This code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUID)


==== /.src/cryptoRandomUUID.ts (4 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics cryptoRandomUUID:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    // Should trigger - crypto.randomUUID() at module level
    export const moduleUuid = crypto.randomUUID()
                              ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377078: This code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUID)
    
    // Should trigger - crypto.randomUUID() in regular function
    export const regularUuid = () => crypto.randomUUID()
                                     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377078: This code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUID)
    
    // Should trigger - aliased crypto at module level
    const globalCrypto = crypto
    export const aliasedUuid = globalCrypto.randomUUID()
                               ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377078: This code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUID)
    
    // Should NOT trigger - crypto.randomUUID() inside Effect.gen
    export const uuidInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
      return crypto.randomUUID()
    })
    
    // Should trigger - crypto.randomUUID() inside nested arrow in generator
    export const nestedArrowInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const fn = () => crypto.randomUUID()
                       ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377078: This code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUID)
      return fn
    })
    
    // Should NOT trigger - shadowed crypto
    export const shadowedCrypto = () => {
      const crypto = { randomUUID: () => "fixed" }
      return crypto.randomUUID()
    }
